title: List of computational fluid dynamics software
body: This is a list of computational fluid dynamics software — including multiphysics simulation, finite-element, finite-volume, finite difference, boundary element, riemann solver, dissipative particle dynamics, smoothed particle hydrodynamics, direct numerical simulation, turbulence modeling, aerodynamic potential-flow code, thermal hydraulics, lattice Boltzmann methods and more.
categories: Short description is different from Wikidata
